title: poa pratensis subsp. dolichophylla
intro: Poa pratensis subsp. dolichophylla, also known as tall meadow grass, is a subspecies of the common meadow grass (Poa pratensis) found in various parts of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of tall meadow grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Tall meadow grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to promote overall health and well-being.
